ratings.comment: Darcy is kind to everyone's work yet provides constructive feedback. She is knowledgeable and respected in the field. 476 was my second class with Darcy. Her emphasis on punctuality with attendance and assignments is helpful to stay on track, yet she is understanding of personal circumstances that may affect it. I love her so much.

Professor Padilla isn't awful but she does not understand that many of her students have never worked with film before. She is incredibly critical of your work but does not offer advice on how to fix it. She talks too much about her personal life. She is very accomplished but she cannot teach. She made me hate photography.
